note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: fully-credible large group meets the 85% threshold, no rebate. Vector 2: partially-credible individual market plan below the 80% threshold with 3-year premium-weighted averaging, rebate owed above the de minimis floor. Vector 3: non-credible tiny plan (< 1,000 member life-years) deemed compliant per 158.232, no rebate calculation performed. Vector 4: adjusted earned premium <= 0 (finite gate) -- ratios zeroed, not NaN/Infinity.

vectors.name: large_group_fully_credible_meets_threshold
vectors.description: $5,000,000 earned premium, $200,000 taxes/fees, $4,260,000 adjusted incurred claims, 100,000 member life-years (fully credible, >= 75,000). Raw and adjusted MLR both 88.75%, above the large-group 85% threshold -- no rebate owed.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 45 CFR 158 (ACA Medical Loss Ratio rule): numerator/denominator 158.140-158.162, credibility adjustment 158.230-158.232, 3-year averaging 158.221, rebate calculation 158.240, de minimis 158.243.
output_payload.note: Credibility-adjustment table is a REPRESENTATIVE linear taper, not the exact CMS deductible-banded schedule -- confirm the precise add-on against the current CMS MLR credibility-adjustment table before filing. De minimis check approximates per-enrollee rebate using member_life_years as the enrollee-count proxy.

vectors.name: individual_partially_credible_rebate_owed_3yr_avg
vectors.description: $20,000,000 earned premium, $500,000 taxes/fees, $13,200,000 adjusted incurred claims, 38,000 member life-years (partially credible, midpoint of the 1,000-75,000 band, +4.00pp credibility add-on). Raw MLR 67.69%, current-year adjusted MLR 71.69%. Premium-weighted 3-year average with two prior years (75.00% / 78.00%) comes to 74.75%, below the individual-market 80% threshold -- $1,023,750 rebate owed, $26.94/life above the $5 de minimis floor.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 45 CFR 158 (ACA Medical Loss Ratio rule): numerator/denominator 158.140-158.162, credibility adjustment 158.230-158.232, 3-year averaging 158.221, rebate calculation 158.240, de minimis 158.243.
output_payload.note: Credibility-adjustment table is a REPRESENTATIVE linear taper, not the exact CMS deductible-banded schedule -- confirm the precise add-on against the current CMS MLR credibility-adjustment table before filing. De minimis check approximates per-enrollee rebate using member_life_years as the enrollee-count proxy.

vectors.name: non_credible_tiny_plan_deemed_compliant
vectors.description: 500 member life-years, below the 1,000 non-credible floor per 158.232. No credibility adjustment, no 3-year average, no rebate calculation -- deemed compliant regardless of the raw 62.89% MLR.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 45 CFR 158 (ACA Medical Loss Ratio rule): numerator/denominator 158.140-158.162, credibility adjustment 158.230-158.232, 3-year averaging 158.221, rebate calculation 158.240, de minimis 158.243.
output_payload.note: Credibility-adjustment table is a REPRESENTATIVE linear taper, not the exact CMS deductible-banded schedule -- confirm the precise add-on against the current CMS MLR credibility-adjustment table before filing. De minimis check approximates per-enrollee rebate using member_life_years as the enrollee-count proxy.

vectors.name: zero_adjusted_premium_edge
vectors.description: $100,000 earned premium against $105,000 combined taxes/fees -- adjusted earned premium is negative. Finite gate must zero the MLR instead of producing Infinity/NaN and flag MLR_ZERO_PREMIUM; no rebate math is attempted.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 45 CFR 158 (ACA Medical Loss Ratio rule): numerator/denominator 158.140-158.162, credibility adjustment 158.230-158.232, 3-year averaging 158.221, rebate calculation 158.240, de minimis 158.243.
output_payload.note: Credibility-adjustment table is a REPRESENTATIVE linear taper, not the exact CMS deductible-banded schedule -- confirm the precise add-on against the current CMS MLR credibility-adjustment table before filing. De minimis check approximates per-enrollee rebate using member_life_years as the enrollee-count proxy.
